faqs.question: What pests are covered under general pest control in Elizabeth?
faqs.answer: Our general pest control service covers common Elizabeth pests including ants, cockroaches, spiders, silverfish, earwigs, crickets, and mice. We provide comprehensive interior and exterior treatments tailored to your specific pest problem.

faqs.question: How quickly can you provide pest control service in Elizabeth, NJ?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day service throughout Elizabeth when you call before noon. Emergency services are also available for urgent pest situations. Our technicians serve all Elizabeth zip codes including 07201, 07202, 07206, and 07208.

faqs.question: Why does the price range from $175 to $300?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on property size, severity of infestation, type of pests, and treatment frequency required. A standard apartment treatment starts at $175, while larger homes or severe infestations may reach $300. We provide free estimates with transparent pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: Are your pest control treatments safe for families and pets in Elizabeth homes?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed technicians. We follow strict safety protocols and can provide low-toxicity or organic treatment options upon request for Elizabeth residents concerned about chemical exposure.
